form.formComment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 2.75 lengths at this track over 520m (30.31) beating Asawa Baby in Grade 6 on April 12. Won at her only start from this box. Top chance to make it two from two.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Q Lakeside over 457m. Last start finished 6th over 457m at Q Lakeside beaten 11 lengths (26.15) behind Cash Riot in a Grade 5 on April 14. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

form.formComment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a eighth over 457m at Q Lakeside. Others better.
